title: Return of the Black Eagle
writer: Alexander Pushkin, Baccio Agnoletti, Mario Monicelli
actors: Rossano Brazzi, Irasema Dilián, Gino Cervi
plot: An evil Czarist landowner had mistreated the father and friends of an officer.The officer wreaks vengeance by committing masked coach robberies and insinuates himself into his enemy's castle by pretending to be a French teacher.
